# KanaKö

> KanaKö by TRMS — free music streaming with synced lyrics, listen-together rooms, and friend activity. No ads, no limits.

KanaKö is a web music player that lets people stream songs, follow friends, and host real-time listening rooms. It pulls audio from JioSaavn and metadata from Spotify and YouTube Music.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Personalized greeting, featured playlists, and quick recommendations.
- [Search](/search): Search songs, artists, and playlists across providers.
- [Trending](/trending): Today's most-played tracks.
- [Radio](/radio): Genre and mood-based radio stations.
- [Library](/library): Saved playlists and recently played.
- [Liked Songs](/liked): Tracks the signed-in user has hearted.
- [Together](/together): Public listening rooms and create-your-own room lobby.
- [Friends](/friends): Friend list, activity feed, and direct messages.
- [Profile](/profile): The signed-in user's profile.
- [Settings](/settings): Playback quality, notifications, quiet hours, sleep timer.

## Optional

- [Playlist pages](/playlist/:id): Individual playlist details with track list.
- [Artist pages](/artist/:id): Artist top tracks and information.
- [Room pages](/room/:id): Synchronized live listening room (auth required).
